summary.what: Cut v0.21.0 release: gate fix for parallel-agent flows
summary.why: First-parent gate + dropEmptyFileChanges + TIMBERS_SKIP_CROSS_AGENT_DEBT shipped together as a minor bump — new feature, no breaking changes, fits the v0.3 multi-agent epic (timbers-5f8)
summary.how: just release 0.21.0 generated the changelog via timbers draft changelog | claude -p --model opus, synced site/content/examples/changelog.md, bumped the landing page version badge, then tagged v0.21.0 and pushed; GH Actions handles the binary release
